query:
SELECT id, name, location, priority, sector, stage, owner, contractors,
  overview, equipmentSignals, matchedBusinessLines, opportunityRoute
FROM projects
WHERE id = '1110004';

rows.name: Port of Bunbury Berth 8 Headstocks Stages 2-4 Blast and Paint Services
rows.overview: This tender is for blast and paint services for Berth 8 headstocks at the Port of Bunbury. These services are crucial for maintaining port infrastructure, which involves heavy industrial work. Portable compressed air equipment would be essential for abrasive blasting operations.
